editorial.pullQuote: The recent wage agreement may have averted a strike, but it has left deeper issues unresolved.
summary: Samsung and its labor union reached a wage deal, narrowly avoiding a potentially crippling strike.
The agreement addresses immediate bonus concerns but leaves deeper workplace issues unresolved.
The dispute signals broader tensions between management and workers over long-term labor conditions.
editorial.stance: Editorial warns that while the deal prevents immediate crisis, structural labor reforms remain urgently needed.

editorial.title: [사설] ‘3고’가 ‘성공의 비용’이란 청와대 정책실장의 위험한 인식
editorial.body: 입력 종합 30면 김용범 청와대 정책실장이 최근의 고금리·고물가·고환율의 ‘3고(高)’를 “한국 경제가 새로운 차원으로 도약하는 과정에서 수반되는 성공의 비용으로, 위기의 전조가 아닌 도약의 마찰음”이라고 진단했다. 지난 24일 페이스북에 올린 ‘성공의 비용’이란 글에서다. 지난 13일 반도체 호황으로 예상되는 엄청난 초과 세수의 활용 방안으로 ‘국민배당금’을 언급한 데 이은 도발적 경제 인식이다. 최근 한국 경제 상황이 과거와 달라지긴 했다. 반도체 호황으로 수출이 늘며 경상수지 흑자는 사상 최대를 기록하고 있다. 기업 실적이 개선되고, 외환보유액도 많이 늘어났다. 원-달러 환율이 1500원을 돌파했지만 “현재의 원화 약세는 외환 부족에서 비롯된 것이 아니라 코스피 급등 속 평가 차익을 회수하는 외국인의 외환 수요가 환율을 밀어올렸다”는 그의 설명도 어느 정도 일리는 있다. 문제는 명색이 대통령 최고위 경제참모인 김 실장의 지나친 낙관과 편향된 인식이다. 그는 “반도체·AI 분야의 기업 실적 폭발로 기업 이익과 임금, 자산 가격이 동반 상승해 가계소득이 증가하고 세수가 확충되며 국가부채비율이 자연스럽게 낮아지는 선순환이 작동하고 있다”고 강조했다. 과연 그의 말대로 우리 경제는 장밋빛 일색인가. 지난달 생산자물가는 2.5% 올라 28년여 만에 최고치를 기록했다. 1993조원에 달하는 가계부채는 통계 작성 이후 최대치로 치솟았는데, 주택담보대출 금리 상단은 연 7%를 넘어섰다. 실업 사태는 외환위기에 버금가고 있고, 전월세 대란은 주거 안정까지 위협하고 있다. 지금 한국 경제를 덮치고 있는 고금리·고물가·고환율의 최대 피해자는 두말할 것 없이 서민과 취약계층이다. 김 실장이 ‘3고’로 인한 서민과 취약계층의 고통을 진정으로 공감하고 있다면 ‘도약의 마찰음’ 같은 표현을 쓸 수는 없을 것이다. 더구나 한국 경제의 구조적 문제가 상존하는 상황에서 ‘3고’를 ‘성공의 비용’으로 여기는 안이한 인식은 위험천만이다. 이미 가계와 중소기업·자영업자가 ‘3고’에 짓눌리며 내수가 부진을 면치 못하고 있다. 반도체 호황에 따른 성장의 온기도 일부 대기업과 자산시장에만 집중되며 ‘K자형 양극화’가 점점 심화하고 있다. 김 실장은 “지금 필요한 건 달라진 눈으로 현실을 직시하는 안목”이라고 했다. 하지만 새로운 시각만을 강조하다간 문제를 놓치고 위기에 대처하지 못할 수 있다. 한국 경제가 또 한 번의 도약을 이루기 위해선 과감한 구조개혁과 신성장 동력 발굴이 절실하다. 이런 노력이 수반되지 않는다면 그의 감언은 현실을 호도하는 곡학아세일 뿐이다.

editorial.bodyTr:
Presidential policy chief Kim Yong-beom recently characterized the current "3-High" phenomenon of elevated interest rates, inflation, and exchange rates as "the cost of success accompanying Korea's economic leap to a new dimension, a friction sound of advancement rather than a harbinger of crisis." He made this diagnosis in a Facebook post titled "The Cost of Success" on the 24th. This represents another provocative economic assessment following his mention of a "citizen dividend" on the 13th as a way to utilize the massive windfall tax revenues expected from the semiconductor boom. It is true that Korea's recent economic situation differs from the past. Exports are increasing thanks to the semiconductor boom, and the current account surplus is hitting record highs. Corporate earnings are improving and foreign reserves are growing substantially. Although the won-dollar exchange rate has breached 1,500, his explanation that "the current weakness of the won does not stem from foreign exchange shortages but rather reflects foreign investors' currency demand as they cash in valuation gains amid a KOSPI surge" has some merit.

The problem lies in the excessive optimism and biased perspective of Kim, who serves as the president's top economic adviser. He emphasized that "a virtuous cycle is operating in which explosive corporate earnings in semiconductors and AI drive simultaneous increases in corporate profits, wages, and asset prices, expanding household income and tax revenues while naturally lowering the national debt ratio."

Is our economy truly rosy as he suggests? Last month's producer price index rose 2.5 percent, marking the highest level in nearly 28 years. Household debt, which has surged to 1,993 trillion won, has hit record highs since statistics began, with mortgage interest rates exceeding 7 percent annually. Unemployment approaching the level seen during the foreign exchange crisis and the housing shortage crisis now threaten residential stability. Without question, the greatest victims of the current high interest rates, inflation, and exchange rates are ordinary citizens and vulnerable populations. If Kim truly empathized with the suffering these groups endure from the "3-High," he could not use phrases like "friction sound of advancement." Moreover, given persistent structural problems in the Korean economy, the complacent view of the "3-High" as the "cost of success" is dangerously misguided. Already, households, small businesses, and self-employed workers are being crushed by these conditions, with domestic consumption suffering accordingly. The economic warmth from the semiconductor boom concentrates only among certain large corporations and asset markets, intensifying the "K-shaped polarization."

Kim stated that "what is needed now is the vision to confront reality with fresh eyes." However, emphasizing perspective alone risks overlooking problems and failing to address crises. For Korea's economy to achieve another leap forward, bold structural reform and the discovery of new growth engines are essential. Without such efforts, his reassuring words are merely sophistry obscuring reality.

editorial.title: Fake AI evidence
editorial.body: Police conclude voice recordings were digitally altered in celeb defamation case Police recently filed for an arrest warrant against a YouTuber on charges of spreading false information after broadcasting AI-generated voice recordings and manipulated messenger conversations. Kim Se-ui, head of the YouTube channel Garo Sero Institute, released an audio recording purported to be of the late actor Kim Sae-ron in May last year. He claimed it had been provided by her bereaved family and that it was evidence she had been in a relationship with actor Kim Soo-hyun since her middle school years. However, police concluded that the recording was fake and generated using artificial intelligence. According to reports, the arrest warrant states that the screenshots of KakaoTalk conversations presented by the YouTube channel as messages exchanged between Kim Sae-ron and Kim Soo-hyun in 2016, when she was a middle school student, had likewise been manipulated: Although the other party’s name originally appeared as “Unknown” in the messages, it had allegedly been changed to “Kim Soo-hyun.” Kim Soo-hyun suffered extensive damage after Kim Se-ui raised these allegations. It is reported that his financial losses amount to tens of billions of won, as multiple advertising contracts and drama productions were canceled, leading to penalty claims and lawsuits for damages. He was also forced to endure public moral criticism over allegations that he had dated a minor, and his acting career was, for all practical purposes, over. Although a final court ruling has yet to be made, if the AI fabrication is confirmed through the trial, severe punishment will be necessary to serve as a warning about evidence manipulation using advanced technology. Because he is an actor whose public image is of critical importance, the harm he suffered was likely particularly severe. However, evidence manipulation using AI is a threat that could affect any member of the public. In this case, police are said to have been able to determine whether the recordings were manipulated by analyzing the voice data in the audio files. This may have been possible because the material had been broadcast since March of last year. Had the evidence been manipulated using today’s AI technology, it might not have been so easy to detect. Evidence fabrication using AI had already appeared even before this case, creating confusion in both investigations and trials. Last year, a man in his 20s who committed investment fraud by forging documents with AI image-generation tools managed to avoid detention after submitting a fake bank balance certificate to a judge, but was later taken into custody once the certificate was found to be falsified. AI-generated fake content about celebrities is often seized upon by “cyber wreckers” who spread sensational rumors to boost their subscriber counts, resulting in damage that rapidly snowballs for the celebrities concerned. As AI technology advances, people become more likely to accept fake content as real, and once someone is stigmatized, it is difficult to remove that label — no matter how strongly the victim asserts their innocence. Furthermore, AI is making rapid progress not only in text and voice generation, but also in image and video production and processing. It is getting harder and harder to verify the authenticity of content, be it text, voice, images, or video, as AI manipulation becomes more sophisticated. AI is driving a paradigm shift across almost every sector of society. The criminal justice system is no exception. Investigative authorities must ensure experts are trained to detect AI-based manipulation of evidence and the relevant supporting infrastructure. In addition, changes in trial procedures are needed to strengthen the verification of evidence reliability. Above all, AI-based manipulation of evidence should be regarded as a grave obstruction of justice, and those who manipulate or maliciously disseminate it must be held strictly accountable. editorial.bodyTr:
경찰, 연예인 명예훼손 사건에서 음성 녹음이 디지털 조작됐다고 결론

경찰은 최근 AI로 생성된 음성 녹음과 조작된 메신저 대화를 방송한 유튜버를 거짓 정보 유포 혐의로 체포영장을 청구했다. 유튜브 채널 '가로세로 연구소'의 김세의 운영자는 지난해 5월 고인 배우 김새론으로 추정되는 음성 녹음을 공개했다. 그는 이 음성이 유족으로부터 제공받았으며 김새론이 배우 김수현과 중학교 시절부터 연인 관계였다는 증거라고 주장했다. 그러나 경찰은 해당 녹음이 인공지능으로 생성된 조작물이라고 결론지었다. 보도에 따르면 체포영장에는 해당 유튜브 채널이 2016년 중학생 시절 김새론과 김수현 사이에 오고간 메시지라고 제시한 카카오톡 대화 스크린샷도 조작된 것이라고 기재되어 있다. 원래 상대방 이름이 메시지에 '알 수 없음'으로 표시되어 있었으나 '김수현'으로 변조되었다는 것이다.

김수현은 김세의의 이러한 주장으로 인해 광범위한 피해를 입었다. 여러 광고 계약과 드라마 제작이 취소되면서 손해배상 청구와 소송으로 이어져 피해액이 수십억 원에 달하는 것으로 알려졌다. 미성년자와의 연애 의혹으로 사회적 도덕적 비판도 감수해야 했으며, 그의 연기 경력은 실질적으로 단절되었다. 아직 최종 법원 판결이 내려지지 않았지만, 만약 재판을 통해 AI 조작이 확실히 입증된다면 첨단 기술을 이용한 증거 조작에 대한 경고가 될 수 있도록 엄중한 처벌이 필요하다. 공개 이미지가 매우 중요한 배우이기 때문에 입은 피해가 특히 심했을 가능성이 높다. 그러나 AI를 이용한 증거 조작은 일반인 누구나 피해를 입을 수 있는 위협이다.

이번 사건에서 경찰은 음성 파일의 음성 데이터를 분석함으로써 녹음이 조작되었는지 여부를 판단할 수 있었던 것으로 알려졌다. 이는 해당 자료가 지난해 3월부터 방송되었기 때문에 가능했을 수도 있다. 만약 오늘날의 AI 기술로 증거가 조작되었다면 탐지가 그리 쉽지 않았을 수도 있다. AI를 이용한 증거 조작은 이번 사건 이전에도 나타나 수사와 재판에서 혼란을 야기했다. 지난해 20대 남성이 AI 이미지 생성 도구로 문서를 위조해 투자 사기를 저질렀을 때, 위조된 통장 잔액 증명서를 판사에게 제출해 구속을 피했다가 나중에 위조가 적발되면서 결국 구속되었다.

AI로 생성된 연예인 관련 가짜 콘텐츠는 흔히 구독자 수를 늘리기 위해 선정적인 루머를 퍼뜨리는 '사이버 악플러'들에게 악용되며, 그로 인한 피해는 해당 연예인에게 급속도로 눈덩이처럼 불어난다. AI 기술이 발전할수록 사람들은 가짜 콘텐츠를 실제로 받아들일 가능성이 높아지고, 한번 낙인이 찍히면 피해자가 아무리 강하게 무죄를 주장해도 그 꼬리표를 떨쳐내기 어렵다. 더욱이 AI는 텍스트와 음성 생성뿐만 아니라 이미지와 영상 제작 및 처리 분야에서도 빠르게 진전하고 있다. AI 조작이 점점 더 정교해지면서 텍스트, 음성, 이미지, 영상 등 어떤 콘텐츠든 진위 여부를 확인하기가 점점 어려워지고 있다.

AI는 사회 거의 모든 분야에서 패러다임의 변화를 주도하고 있다. 형사사법 체계도 예외가 아니다. 수사 당국은 AI 기반 증거 조작을 탐지할 수 있는 전문가를 양성하고 관련 지원 인프라를 구축해야 한다. 또한 증거의 신뢰성 검증을 강화하기 위해 재판 절차의 개선이 필요하다. 무엇보다 AI 기반 증거 조작은 사법 방해의 중대한 범죄로 간주되어야 하며, 이를 조작하거나 악의적으로 유포하는 자들은 엄격히 책임을 져야 한다.

leanScore.rationale: The editorial focuses on a concrete legal/technological problem (AI-generated false evidence) without ideological framing, advocates for systemic safeguards and enforcement across institutions, and treats the issue as a threat to all citizens rather than targeting or defending any particular political camp.

editorials.title: Fake AI evidence
editorials.body: Police conclude voice recordings were digitally altered in celeb defamation case Police recently filed for an arrest warrant against a YouTuber on charges of spreading false information after broadcasting AI-generated voice recordings and manipulated messenger conversations. Kim Se-ui, head of the YouTube channel Garo Sero Institute, released an audio recording purported to be of the late actor Kim Sae-ron in May last year. He claimed it had been provided by her bereaved family and that it was evidence she had been in a relationship with actor Kim Soo-hyun since her middle school years. However, police concluded that the recording was fake and generated using artificial intelligence. According to reports, the arrest warrant states that the screenshots of KakaoTalk conversations presented by the YouTube channel as messages exchanged between Kim Sae-ron and Kim Soo-hyun in 2016, when she was a middle school student, had likewise been manipulated: Although the other party’s name originally appeared as “Unknown” in the messages, it had allegedly been changed to “Kim Soo-hyun.” Kim Soo-hyun suffered extensive damage after Kim Se-ui raised these allegations. It is reported that his financial losses amount to tens of billions of won, as multiple advertising contracts and drama productions were canceled, leading to penalty claims and lawsuits for damages. He was also forced to endure public moral criticism over allegations that he had dated a minor, and his acting career was, for all practical purposes, over. Although a final court ruling has yet to be made, if the AI fabrication is confirmed through the trial, severe punishment will be necessary to serve as a warning about evidence manipulation using advanced technology. Because he is an actor whose public image is of critical importance, the harm he suffered was likely particularly severe. However, evidence manipulation using AI is a threat that could affect any member of the public. In this case, police are said to have been able to determine whether the recordings were manipulated by analyzing the voice data in the audio files. This may have been possible because the material had been broadcast since March of last year. Had the evidence been manipulated using today’s AI technology, it might not have been so easy to detect. Evidence fabrication using AI had already appeared even before this case, creating confusion in both investigations and trials. Last year, a man in his 20s who committed investment fraud by forging documents with AI image-generation tools managed to avoid detention after submitting a fake bank balance certificate to a judge, but was later taken into custody once the certificate was found to be falsified. AI-generated fake content about celebrities is often seized upon by “cyber wreckers” who spread sensational rumors to boost their subscriber counts, resulting in damage that rapidly snowballs for the celebrities concerned. As AI technology advances, people become more likely to accept fake content as real, and once someone is stigmatized, it is difficult to remove that label — no matter how strongly the victim asserts their innocence. Furthermore, AI is making rapid progress not only in text and voice generation, but also in image and video production and processing. It is getting harder and harder to verify the authenticity of content, be it text, voice, images, or video, as AI manipulation becomes more sophisticated. AI is driving a paradigm shift across almost every sector of society. The criminal justice system is no exception. Investigative authorities must ensure experts are trained to detect AI-based manipulation of evidence and the relevant supporting infrastructure. In addition, changes in trial procedures are needed to strengthen the verification of evidence reliability. Above all, AI-based manipulation of evidence should be regarded as a grave obstruction of justice, and those who manipulate or maliciously disseminate it must be held strictly accountable. summary: YouTuber arrested for using AI-generated fake voice recordings to defame actor Kim Soo-hyun.
Manipulated evidence caused tens of billions won in losses, destroyed career, and public reputation.
Editorial warns AI manipulation poses growing justice threat; calls for expert detection and strict accountability.
editorials.stance: AI-based evidence manipulation is a grave threat to justice systems requiring trained experts, procedural reforms, and severe penalties.

summaryTr: Users of far-right websites engaged in 'play' using hate symbols at a memorial service for Roh Moo-hyun.
A 'Tank Day' event mocking the May 18 uprising and the late activist Park Jong-chul took place.
Platform regulation and anti-discrimination legislation must be used to counter hate culture.
editorials.bodyTr: On the 23rd, when a memorial service for former President Roh Moo-hyun was held, dozens of users presumed to be from the far-right website 'Ilbe' (Ilgan Best Storage) reportedly roamed through Bongha Village engaging in 'hate play' using symbols and signs known only to themselves. The 'Tank Day' event mocking the May 18 Gwangju Democratization Movement and the late labor activist Park Jong-chul was a stark reminder of how hatred continues to fester in our society.

summaryTr: Domestic market interest rates are surging, raising risks of household debt-fueled speculation.
Middle East oil price hikes and inflation concerns are driving up global interest rates.
Debt burdens on vulnerable borrowers and marginal companies are expected to intensify.
editorials.bodyTr: Domestic market interest rates are surging sharply. The fallout from soaring global government bond yields, driven by elevated oil prices originating from the Middle East and inflation concerns, appears to be gaining full momentum in Korea. There are growing concerns that the risks faced by households that borrowed to invest in asset markets, as well as the burden on vulnerable borrowers and marginal firms, will intensify significantly. editorials.pullQuote: 기업 키운 만큼 주식 보상한 中企, 이런 게 진짜 성과급
summary: 중국 기업들이 직원에게 회사 성장만큼 주식으로 보상한다.
진정한 성과급은 금전이 아닌 기업 소유권 공유다.
한국 기업도 이런 혁신적 보상 체계를 배워야 한다.
editorials.stance: 직원의 기업 성장 참여와 이익 공유가 진정한 성과급 문화다
editorials.titleTr: [사설] 기업 키운 만큼 주식 보상한 中企, 이런 게 진짜 성과급
summaryTr: Chinese companies reward employees with stock proportional to company growth.
True performance compensation is sharing corporate ownership, not just money.
Korean companies should learn from this innovative compensation system.

leanScore.label: Lean progressive
leanScore.rationale: 노동자의 기업 이익 공유와 소유권 확대를 강조하며 한국 기업의 혁신적 보상 체계 도입을 촉구하는 진보적 노동 정책 지향
